description: A photograph of a beagle wearing a working-dog harness, seated on a metal inspection counter behind an assortment of seized food items including canned goods, packaged sausages, vacuum-sealed dried meats, and other wrapped products. A printed sign at the right reads PORT OF CHICAGO, O'HARE AIRPORT AGRICULTURE with a Customs and Border Protection seal.
notable_text: PORT OF CHICAGO; O'HARE AIRPORT AGRICULTURE
